column4: Remote script downloaded and piped straight into a shell

PowerShell invoked with a base64-encoded command
eval() of base64-decoded data, a common obfuscation/staging trick

Long run of hex-escaped bytes, typical of packed payloads

Private key material committed to history
npm lifecycle script that downloads or evals at install time

Source code containing an Ethereum-address regex (clipper malware matches victim addresses this way)
Code hooking the injected web3 provider
